nodes.label: Sprint 3 tests: cron API, skills API, memory API, input validation.
Create a session and register it with the cleanup fixture.
Verify /api/skills returns built-in skills.      Resilient to test-isolation pol
Verify each skill has the required fields.      Resilient to test-isolation poll
Verify a known built-in skill is fetchable from /api/skills/content.      Resili
Verify /api/skills returns multiple built-in skills.      Resilient to test-isol
Adding a path outside home is now allowed when the user explicitly provides it.
System paths (/, /etc, /sys) are always rejected even with the relaxed add valid
Legacy /api/chat must use the same trusted workspace validation as /api/chat/sta
